TopoFile
  NamespaceDecl 'orders'
    VisibilitySection 'public'
      HandlerDecl 'parse(str raw) -> record<id: int, amount: float>'
      HandlerDecl 'validate(record<id: int, amount: float> o) -> record<id: int, amount: float>'
      HandlerDecl 'persist(record<id: int, amount: float> o) -> bool'
      FlowBlock 'order_pipeline'
        Edge parse -> validate
        Edge validate -> persist
        Edge persist -> void [terminal]
